decision_reasons: All 13 handoffs have reward 1, unanimous positive consumer assessments, no revisions, and no revision requests.
The 78 shadow updates match the expected six directed updates per handoff.
Every delta satisfies alpha × (reward − expected_success_before) with alpha 0.05, and every shadow_trust_after equals trust_before plus the proposed delta.
Repeated observations correctly use diminishing deltas of 0.025, 0.0225, 0.02025, and 0.018225; no clamping discrepancy is present.
Run IDs, stages, timestamps, and artifact evidence are internally aligned.

Retained the aggregate reward-0 memories for Niko and Tundra because the canonical handoff reward is zero despite Ember's individual acceptance.

decision_reasons: All six canonical handoffs have unanimous consumer acceptance, reward 1, no revision requests, and artifact evidence matching the producer stage.
Every shadow update satisfies delta = alpha × (reward − expected_success_before): 0.05 × (1 − 0.67195) = 0.0164025, or 0.05 × (1 − 0.57195) = 0.0214025 for the EXECUTE handoff.
Every shadow_trust_after equals trust_before plus the proposed delta, allowing only ordinary floating-point representation differences.
The proposed persistent memories preserve evidence-specific learning and give every agent at least one entry containing the exact token [run:exp04_coveragecanvas_20260717].

resolved_issues: Confirmed all six handoff records are internally consistent across assessments, rewards, revisions, stages, and evidence.
Confirmed all 36 shadow trust updates use the stated alpha, reward, prediction error, delta, and resulting trust consistently.
Confirmed proposed memory consolidation retains exact run-specific evidence for all 14 agents.

decision_reasons: All six canonical handoffs are internally consistent: five rewards are 1, while the revised SIMULATE-to-EXECUTE handoff has reward 0 because Rook rejected it and supplied revision requests.
All 36 shadow updates use alpha 0.05 and satisfy proposed_delta = alpha × reward_prediction_error and shadow_trust_after = trust_before + proposed_delta.
The SIMULATE-to-EXECUTE negative deltas correctly use 0 - 0.614755 = -0.614755, yielding -0.03073775; successful handoffs use 1 - 0.704755 = 0.295245, yielding 0.01476225.
Every consolidated agent memory retains evidence-backed text containing the exact token [run:step13_echoledger_live_20260718].
